description_long: This is a plush, single-seat armchair upholstered in a muted olive-brown fabric, featuring a broad, deep seat and thick, straight armrests. The seat and back cushions are visibly padded, providing comfort and support, with the back cushion slightly taller than the armrests. A dark green decorative pillow with a subtle gold geometric pattern rests against the back cushion, adding a touch of contrast and style. The armchair stands on four short, tapered black legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The upholstery has a slightly worn, matte texture, suggesting frequent use and a cozy, lived-in feel. The overall design is modern and boxy, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A boxy, olive-brown upholstered armchair with thick cushions, straight armrests, and a decorative green pillow, supported by short black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, thick armrests, back cushion, and decorative pillow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the profile of the back cushion and pillow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, slightly angled backrest and the armchair's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and the back cushion's thickness.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with subtle fabric texture
